allow: PowerShell($vcvars = "`"C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\VC\\Auxiliary\\Build\\vcvars64.bat`""; $cmake = "`"C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\Common7\\IDE\\CommonExtensions\\Microsoft\\CMake\\CMake\\bin\\cmake.exe`""; $buildDir = "C:\\Users\\sunli\\Desktop\\期末大作业\\main\\build"; cmd /c "$vcvars && $cmake --build $buildDir --config Release 2>&1")

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\sunli\\anaconda3\\Library\\bin;" + $env:Path; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\sunli\\Desktop\\期末大作业\\main\\build\\Release\\ImageNodeEditor.exe" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\); Write-Output "App started and ran successfully \(killed after 500ms\)"; } else { Write-Output "App exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; })

PowerShell($outDir = "C:\\Users\\sunli\\Desktop\\期末大作业\\main\\build\\Release"; $binDir = "C:\\Users\\sunli\\anaconda3\\Library\\bin"; # check apps platform requirements; Copy-Item "$binDir\\Qt5Concurrent_conda.dll" "$outDir\\Qt5Concurrent.dll" -Force; Copy-Item "$binDir\\Qt5Svg_conda.dll" "$outDir\\Qt5Svg.dll" -Force; Copy-Item "$binDir\\Qt5Xml_conda.dll" "$outDir\\Qt5Xml.dll" -Force; Write-Output "copied additional DLLs"; # also check image formats; Get-ChildItem "$binDir\\..\\plugins\\imageformats" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
